ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "n_train" INTEGER /* Number of training samples used */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round of the experiment */,
  "dataset" TEXT /* Reference to the dataset used for the experiment */,
  "auc" REAL /* Area Under Curve metric for model performance */,
  "method" TEXT /* Machine learning method used (e.g., AdaBoost) */,
  "num_features" INTEGER /* Number of features used in the model */,
  "holdout_access_count" INTEGER /* Count of times the holdout dataset was accessed */,
  "cum_holdout_access_count" INTEGER /* Cumulative count of holdout accesses */,
  "cum_budget_decrease" REAL /* Total budget decrease by round */,
  "pos_prop_train" REAL /* Proportion of positive samples in the training set */,
  "pos_prop_holdout" REAL /* Proportion of positive samples in the holdout set */,
  "pos_prop_test" REAL /* Proportion of positive samples in the test set */,
  "replication" INTEGER /* Replication identifier for experiments */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user conducting the experiment */,
  "experiment_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment started */,
  "experiment_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment ended */,
  "experiment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "experiment_version" TEXT /* Version of the experiment */,
  "hardware_used" TEXT /* Hardware configuration used for the experiment */,
  "software_environment" TEXT /* Software environment used for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_method FOREIGN KEY ("method") REFERENCES methods ("method_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset FOREIGN KEY ("dataset") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "dataset_size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "dataset_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "dataset_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method (e.g., AdaBoost) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method's working principle */,
  "method_version" TEXT /* Version of the method */,
  "method_parameters" TEXT /* Detailed parameters of the method used */,
  "method_performance_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the method's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_importance" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related experiment */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "importance_score" REAL /* Importance score assigned to the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  "feature_source" TEXT /* Source of the feature (e.g., raw data, derived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_importance_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_tracking" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related experiment */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round of the experiment */,
  "allocated_budget" REAL /* Allocated budget for the round */,
  "actual_spent" REAL /* Actual budget spent in the round */,
  "budget_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the budget allocation */,
  "budget_source" TEXT /* Source of the budget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_tracking_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user is part of */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the organization */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
